identity.tone: Analytical, Precise, High-Frequency, Trustworthy, 'Bloomberg for Football'
identity.aesthetic: Fintech Sports Data - Dark, Neon, Dense, Grid-heavy

headings.style: Uppercase for top-level headers, Tight tracking

mono.usage: Data points, Timestamps, Odds, Risk Scores

visual_enhancers.grid_overlay: background-size: 40px 40px; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border for 'Elite' pricing card and key features

buttons.primary: bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#32e012] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 uppercase tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-[#39FF14] text-[#39FF14] hover:bg-[#39FF14]/10 uppercase tracking-wide

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-none md:rounded-sm hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#39FF14] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14] rounded-sm h-12

badges.live: bg-[#39FF14]/10 text-[#39FF14] border border-[#39FF14]/20 animate-pulse font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase
badges.risk: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase

layout_grids.hero: Grid with 12 columns. Left 7 cols for text, Right 5 cols for 'Live Dashboard Simulation' graphic.
layout_grids.bento: Grid with dense packing. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for emphasis. No gaps larger than gap-6.
layout_grids.section_spacing: py-24 or py-32 for major sections. gap-12 for content.

motion.hover: Scale 1.02 for cards. Brightness 1.1 for buttons.
motion.infinite: Marquee for 'Live Opportunities' feed. Pulsing green dot for 'Live' status.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text. Keep text sharp and legible.
Use uppercase for all labels (e.g., 'RISK SCORE', 'CONFIDENCE').
Ensure all numbers are monospace (JetBrains Mono).
Interactive elements must have a distinct hover state (glow or border color change).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all major headings to maintain the sports/analytics brand.
Never use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use #0a0a0a or #121212.
Neon Green (#39FF14) should be used sparingly for high-impact elements only (CTAs, Live Indicators, Profit stats).
All components must be responsive. Mobile: Stacked. Desktop: Grid.
Use Lucide React for icons. Style them with stroke-width=1.5 for a technical look.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the frontend for BETRADARMUS. Focus on the 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic. It must look expensive, fast, and precise. Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and personas. For the 'Live Dashboard' in the Hero, create a visual simulation using CSS Grid, Borders, and Monospace text. Do not use actual complex charting libraries if a simple CSS composition can achieve the 'Look'. Use Recharts if charts are strictly necessary. Implement the 'Early Access' form to send data to a MongoDB backend (simulate the API call structure). Create separate pages for Legal content.
